additional_notes: The Georgia State Pro Day was held on March 11, 2026, but as of March 12, 2026, no detailed testing results or full participant lists have been published by any major draft media outlet. The Pro Football Network schedule listed only 1 tracked prospect (WR Ted Hurst) for this pro day. Georgia State is a Sun Belt Conference program with limited NFL draft exposure; Ted Hurst (WR) was the school's only 2026 NFL Combine invitee. Hurst's NFL Combine results are available (6'4", 206 lbs, 4.42 forty, 36.5" vertical, 135" broad jump, 32 5/8" arms, 9 3/4" hands) but his pro day-specific results have not yet been reported. It is common for smaller-school pro days to receive minimal or no media coverage, and results — if published at all — may take several days to appear. The Georgia State athletics website (georgiastatesports.com) has not posted a football pro day recap. This entry should be updated once results become available from official school sources or draft media outlets.
